title: Hyundai – Progress of Humanity
titleZh: 现代汽车 - 人类进步
description: The lines between living space and moving space are being blurred. Activities that people wish to conduct in the car is evolving and getting much more diverse and complex. The goal of Hyundai designers is to develop cars that are safer and smarter, going above and beyond people's expectations. It's what good design should be: to be progressive, to be innovative, and to be proactive caring.
descriptionZh: 生活空间和移动空间之间的界限正变得模糊。人们希望在车内进行的活动正变得越来越多样化和复杂。现代汽车设计师的目标是开发更安全、更智能的汽车，超越人们的期望。这正是好设计应该具备的品质：不断进步，创新，以及积极关爱。

additionalVideos.longTitle: Hyundai Experiencing More in a Tiny Home
additionalVideos.description: In search of adventure and a simpler lifestyle, this family hit the road in a tiny, traveling home. Leaving routine behind, the Collier family found freedom spending time together – exploring the length and breadth of New Zealand and its stunning scenery.

additionalVideos.longTitle: Hyundai Driving Toward a Sustainable Future with David de Rothschild
additionalVideos.description:
For the last decade, adventurer and environmentalist David de Rothschild has been trying to push the plastics conversation. His relationship with Hyundai started in 2016 as both realized they shared a common understanding of our planet's future.

Today we live with a greater understanding of sustainability challenges – and with a host of solutions, too. IONIQ, Hyundai’s new electric line-up, utilizes sustainable materials that will allow the vehicle to perform with a much lighter footprint. By listening and learning from others, there’s an opportunity for the whole system to shift to a more sustainable way of being. If we join hands, sustainability for human progress is within our reach.

production.prod_brand: Hyundai
production.prod_agency: CNN Create
production.prod_production_company: Vantage Pictures

description: Incredible power in a lightweight body. That is the Roborck H7. Use it to make cleaning in tricky areas easier than ever.

additionalVideos.description: MagBase accessories make it easy to snap your accessories where you need them, or just put them away neatly on the dock.
Love your pets, hate their fur? No problem. Roborock H7 is a fur capturing powerhouse.
Intensely powerful suction easily clears dust from floors and carpets, leaving your home floors literally spotless.

additionalVideos.longTitle: Roborock H7 Less Mess with a Dustbag
additionalVideos.description: Sick of dust clouds coming up every time you empty your bin? Got allergies? Don't worry, use the H7 with a dustbag and make dust clouds history.
Equipped with a massive LiPo battery, you can clean using the Roborock H7 for up to 90 minutes without changing a battery.

title: DJI – Introducing FlightHub
titleZh: 大疆 - FlightHub 介绍
description: Drone platforms have proved a valuable resource for a host of industrial applications, including disaster response and construction. The expansion of drone operations has also presented a difficulty for scale management, standardizing procedures, and ensuring reliable regulatory compliance. To help organizations of all sizes conquer this challenge, DJI introduces FlightHub, enabling enterprise users to manage live operations, organize fleets, and log all of their historical flight data. Organize your aerial fleet with FlightHub, the ultimate solution for managing your drone operations.
descriptionZh: 无人机平台已成为包括灾难响应和建筑在内的众多工业应用的有价值的资源。无人机运营的扩展也给规模管理、标准化程序和确保可靠的监管合规性带来了挑战。为了帮助各种规模的组织应对这一挑战，大疆推出了 FlightHub，使企业用户能够管理实时运营、组织机队并记录所有历史飞行数据。通过 FlightHub 组织您的空中机队，这是管理您无人机运营的终极解决方案。.

production.prod_brand: DJI
production.prod_production_company: Vantage Pictures
production.prod_director: Zacharia Lorenz

seo.metaDescription: DJI introduces FlightHub, a powerful drone fleet management platform for enterprise aerial operations.
seo.metaDescriptionZh: 大疆推出 FlightHub，一款强大的无人机机队管理平台，用于企业空中作业。.

title: DJI – Introducing Mavic 2 Series
titleZh: 大疆 – Mavic 2 系列介绍
description: The Mavic 2 is a feat of engineering and technological innovation and comes in two versions. The Mavic 2 Pro comes equipped with the all-new Hasselblad L1D-20c camera while the Mavic 2 Zoom sports a 12 MP, 1/2.3-inch sensor with up to 4x zoom, including a 2x optical zoom (24–48mm) for even more creative options.
descriptionZh: Mavic 2 是一款工程技术和科技创新的杰作，共有两个版本。Mavic 2 Pro 配备了全新的哈苏 L1D-20c 相机，而 Mavic 2 Zoom 则配备了 1200 万像素、1/2.3 英寸传感器，高达 4 倍变焦，包括 2 倍光学变焦（24–48mm），以提供更多创意选项。.

production.prod_brand: DJI
production.prod_production_company: Vantage Pictures
production.prod_director: Zacharia Lorenz

title: DJI – Introducing Matrice 600
titleZh: 大疆——推出悟Pro 600
description: The new DJI Matrice 600 is a heavy-lifting platform that gives you the freedom to use the best camera equipment available to shoot from the sky. Capable of extended flight times and featuring built-in and add-on redundancies for maximum reliability, the M600 is the ideal aerial system for professional filmmaking.
descriptionZh: 新款 DJI Matrice 600 是一款重型飞行平台，让您可以自由地使用最先进的相机设备从空中进行拍摄。M600 具备超长续航能力，并内置和可选配冗余系统以实现最高可靠性，是专业电影制作的理想航空系统。.

production.prod_brand: DJI

title: DJI – Introducing Matrice 200 Series
titleZh: 大疆Matrice 200
description: The Matrice 200 Series unlocks the full potential of commercial drones for enterprise users who demand reliability, accuracy and efficiency. Built with an innovative aircraft design, the M200 is both rugged and versatile, making it the perfect tool for inspection, search and rescue, construction, mapping and more.
descriptionZh: Matrice 200 系列为要求可靠性、精度和效率的企业用户释放了商用无人机的全部潜力。M200 采用创新的飞机设计，坚固耐用且用途广泛，是检查、搜索救援、建筑、测绘等应用的理想工具。.

title: DJI – Introducing Master Wheels
titleZh: 大疆 – Master Wheels 隆重登场
description: For the most experienced cinematographers in the film industry, control over the shot is what defines a professional. DJI Master Wheels are an advanced wheel controller that gives artists the finest accuracy and precision in every gimbal movement.
descriptionZh: 对于电影行业经验最丰富的摄影师来说，对镜头画面的掌控是专业性的体现。DJI 映画轮是一款先进的轮式控制器，为艺术家在每一次云台运动中提供了极致的精准度和精确性。.

title: DJI – Introducing Phantom 4 Pro
titleZh: 大疆——Phantom 4 Pro 隆重发布
description: The DJI Phantom 4 Pro redefines the iconic Phantom series, bringing imaging and intelligence to new heights. Its new camera equipped with a larger 1-inch sensor and the ability to capture 4K video at 60fps and while its FlightAutonomy system adds dual rear vision sensors and two infrared sensors for a total of 5 directions of obstacle sensing and greater protection.
descriptionZh: 大疆精灵 4 Pro 重新定义了标志性的精灵系列，将影像和智能提升到了新的高度。它全新的相机配备了更大的 1 英寸传感器，能够以 60fps 的帧率拍摄 4K 视频；其 FlightAutonomy（飞控）系统增加了双后视视觉传感器和两个红外传感器，共拥有 5 个方向的障碍物感知能力，提供更强的保护。.

production.prod_brand: DJI
production.prod_production_company: Vantage Pictures

title: DJI – Introducing Zenmuse X5 Series
titleZh: 大疆 – Zenmuse X5 系列介绍
description: The DJI Zenmuse X5 Series marks the next evolution of aerial camera technology. The Zenmuse X5 and Zenmuse X5R are designed to work seamlessly with the DJI Inspire 1, so that you’re ready to fly and capture professional-level footage in seconds. The large Micro Four Thirds sensor in the Zenmuse X5 Series cameras captures incredibly detailed 16 megapixel photos and 4K video. The Zenmuse X5R also records lossless 4K video in CinemaDNG RAW format and comes with a 512GB mini-SSD drive for media storage.
descriptionZh: DJI Zenmuse X5 系列是航空摄影摄像技术的新一次飞跃。Zenmuse X5 和 Zenmuse X5R 专为 DJI Inspire 1 设计，可无缝配合，让您瞬间准备就绪，捕捉专业级影像。Zenmuse X5 系列.

production.prod_brand: DJI

title: DJI – Introducing Zenmuse Z30
titleZh: 大疆 – 推出 Zenmuse Z30
description: Aerial platforms are rapidly becoming vital tools for businesses looking to more efficiently collect information crucial to their operations. As the first integrated aerial camera with an optical zoom up to 30x, the Zenmuse Z30 offers unparalleled image data capture. Designed to seamlessly integrate with DJI’s Matrice series of airframes, the Zenmuse Z30 works right out of the box and gives access to the intelligent features DJI is known for.
descriptionZh: 空中平台正迅速成为企业收集运营所需的关键信息的更为高效的重要工具。作为首款集成光学变焦高达 30 倍的航拍相机，禅思 Z30 可提供无与伦比的图像数据采集能力。Zenmuse Z30 设计宗旨是与 DJI 的 Matrice 系列机架无缝集成，开箱即用，并能访问 DJI 享誉业界的智能功能。.

title: DJI – Introducing Zenmuse XT2
titleZh: 大疆 – 推出 Zenmuse XT2
description: Join the next generation of commercial drone solutions with the DJI Zenmuse XT2. By pairing the FLIR Tau 2's thermal sensor and 4K visual camera with DJI’s leading stabilization and machine intelligence technology, the Zenmuse XT2 transforms valuable aerial data into actionable insights saving time, money, and lives.
descriptionZh: 加入 DJI Zenmuse XT2，开启下一代商用无人机解决方案。通过将 FLIR Tau 2 的热传感器和 4K 可视相机与 DJI 领先的稳定性和机器学习技术相结合，Zenmuse XT2 将有价值的航拍数据转化为可操作的见解，从而节省时间、金钱和生命。.

title: DJI – Meet Osmo Pocket
titleZh: 大疆 – 认识 Osmo Pocket
description: Transform life’s moments into a cinematic memory in just seconds. Meet Osmo Pocket, the smallest 3-axis stabilized handheld camera DJI has ever designed. Able to capture stunning images thanks to a 1/2.3-inch sensor and 80° wide-angle lens, the Osmo Pocket is small enough to fit in your pocket and powerful enough to share your best moments at any time, no matter where life takes you.
descriptionZh: 将生活中的精彩瞬间，秒变电影般的记忆。认识 Osmo Pocket，这是 DJI 设计过的最小巧的三轴稳定手持云台相机。凭借 1/2.3 英寸传感器和 80° 广角镜头，Osmo Pocket 能够捕捉令人惊叹的画面，它足够小巧，可以放入口袋；也足够强大，无论生活带你去往何方，都能随时分享你的精彩瞬间。.

production.prod_brand: DJI

title: DJI – Meet Spark
titleZh: 大疆 – 认识 Spark
description: Meet Spark, DJI’s first ever mini drone. Signature technologies, new gesture control, and unbelievable portability make your aerials more fun and intuitive than ever before. With five different colors, there’s a Spark for everyone.
descriptionZh: 认识 Spark，大疆首款迷你无人机。标志性的技术、全新的手势控制以及令人难以置信的便携性，让您的航拍比以往任何时候都更加有趣和直观。Spark 有五种不同的颜色，总有一款适合您。.

production.prod_brand: DJI

seo.metaDescriptionZh: 大疆推出 Spark 航拍无人机，让新一代创作者也能轻松体验空中摄影。.

title: DJI – Meet the RoboMaster S1
titleZh: DJI – 认识 RoboMaster S1
description: The RoboMaster S1 is DJI’s advanced new educational robot that opens the door to limitless learning and entertainment. Develop programming skills, get familiar with AI technology, and enjoy thrilling FPV driving with games and competition. From young learners to tech enthusiasts, get ready to discover endless possibilities with the RoboMaster S1.
descriptionZh: RoboMaster S1 是大疆推出的先进教育机器人，开启无限的学习和娱乐之门。培养编程技能，熟悉人工智能技术，并通过游戏和竞赛享受激动人心的 FPV 驾驶体验。从青少年学习者到科技爱好者，准备好与 RoboMaster S1 一起探索无限可能。.

title: DJI – My Mavic
titleZh: DJI – 我的御
longTitle: DJI My Mavic Nomad Filmmaker (ft. Kylie Flavell)
description: Kylie’s unique lifestyle of spontaneous traveling and filmmaking has inspired people across the globe. With the companionship of her Mavic Pro, she can capture and share her adventures with creativity and ease.
descriptionZh: 凯莉独特的生活方式——随性旅行和拍摄电影，激励了世界各地的人们。有了她 Mavic Pro 的陪伴，她就可以轻松、富有创意地捕捉和分享她的冒险经历。.

additionalVideos.longTitle: DJI My Mavic Priceless Moments (ft. Ellie & Jared)
additionalVideos.description: Ellie and Jared share videos of their young boys Jackson and Calvin, (and their dog Penny), with more than a million fans across the world every day. They believe that every moment their family shares together is priceless and worthy of being remembered. With the Mavic Pro, they can document all these moments of their family’s love, shenanigans, and journey.

additionalVideos.longTitle: DJI My Mavic Tech Geek (ft. Kai Man Wong)
additionalVideos.description: Self professed tech geek Kai has played around with his fair share of cool gadgets. But the Mavic Pro is something different altogether.

production.prod_brand: DJI
production.prod_production_company: Vantage Pictures

title: DJI – Zenmuse X7 Showreel
titleZh: 大疆 - 灵眸X7 样片
description: The DJI Zenmuse X7 was designed to bring ultimate professional imaging to aerial cinematography. With a new DL-Mount, multiple prime lenses, and advanced sensors and color systems, the X7 creates breathtaking shots indoors and outdoors, in fair and foul weather, on smooth and rugged landscapes anywhere. The following showreel demonstrates the diverse applications in which the Zenmuse X7 excels when fitted on an Inspire 2 drone, creating a completely integrated system for every shot.
descriptionZh: DJI Zenmuse X7 旨在为航拍电影制作带来极致的专业影像。凭借全新的 DL 卡口、多款定焦镜头以及先进的传感器和色彩系统，X7 无论是在室内还是室外、晴天还是恶劣天气、平坦还是崎岖的地形，都能捕捉到令人惊叹的画面。以下展示片展示了 Zenmuse X7 在安装在 Inspire 2 无人机上时表现出色的多样化应用，为每一次拍摄创建了一个完全集成化的系统。.

production.prod_brand: DJI
production.prod_production_company: Vantage Pictures

seo.metaDescription: The Zenmuse X7 camera delivers breathtaking cinematic imagery in this professional DJI showreel.
seo.metaDescriptionZh: DJI 的这部专业宣传片展示了 Zenmuse X7 相机呈现的令人惊叹的电影级画面。.

title: DJI Matrice 200 Series – Search & Rescue in Extreme Environments
titleZh: 大疆 悟 200 系列 – 严酷环境下的搜救
longTitle: DJI Matrice 200 Series Search & Rescue in Extreme Environments
description:
When it comes to search and rescue missions, time is scarce and mistakes cannot be afforded. Especially in countries like Iceland where weather conditions are harsh and daylight is limited.
Thor Argnrimsson, member of a search and rescue team in Iceland, believes the DJI M200 Series has revolutionized the way in which his team can work. He takes us through the challenges of a typical mission and the ways in which the DJI M200 Series overcomes these obstacles by adding efficiency and reliability to each mission.
descriptionZh:
在搜救任务中，时间紧迫，不容出错。尤其是在冰岛这样天气恶劣、日照时间有限的国家。
冰岛搜救队成员 Thor Argnrimsson 认为，大疆M200系列产品彻底改变了他所在团队的工作方式。他将带领我们了解一次典型任务的挑战，以及大疆M200系列产品如何通过提高任务效率和可靠性来克服这些困难。.

production.prod_brand: DJI
production.prod_production_company: Vantage Pictures
production.prod_director: Zacharia Lorenz

seo.metaDescription: DJI’s Matrice 200 drone supports search and rescue missions in extreme environments in this enterprise campaign film.
seo.metaDescriptionZh: 在这部企业宣传片中，大疆的Matrice 200无人机支持在极端环境下执行搜救任务。.

title: DJI – My Hong Kong
titleZh: 大疆 – 我的香港
description: Hong Kong is a city of wild contrasts, where urban chaos, untamed nature, and perfect solitude come together. For everybody in Hong Kong, the city has something different to offer, and every new place offers a different perspective, making Hong Kong a natural fit for DJI's third flagship store.
descriptionZh: 香港是一座充满野生对比的城市，都市的喧嚣、未经驯服的大自然和完美的宁静在这里交织在一起。香港的每个人都能在这里找到不同的东西，而每一个新的地方都能提供不同的视角，这使得香港成为DJI第三家旗舰店的理想选择。.

title: DJI Mavic 2 – A Cosmic Voyage

description: Welcome to Earth. Our little corner of the universe here is filled with endless beauty and limitless landscapes for those with enough curiosity to explore it. Though we may fail, we try again, all in the name of adventure, carving our paths through time and space, as we reach into the future. Shot using a Mavic 2.
descriptionZh: 欢迎来到地球。我们宇宙中的这个小小角落，为那些拥有足够好奇心去探索的人们，充满了无尽的美景和无限的风景。尽管我们会失败，但我们仍会重试，这一切都是为了冒险，我们在时间与空间中开辟道路，同时探索未来。这是用 Mavic 2 拍摄的。.

title: DJI Mavic 2 – Ski-Mountaineering with Jimmy Chin
titleZh: 大疆御 2 – 吉米·金的滑雪登山之旅
longTitle: DJI Mavic 2 Ski-Mountaineering with Jimmy Chin
description: The coldest corners of the world can also be the most beautiful. Watch as award-winning director Jimmy Chin and freeskiing champion Kit DesLauriers face the formidable mountains and frigid temperatures of Greenland’s western fjords. They must navigate unknown variables as they ascend to the summit, and then ski all the way down to the base. This short video is a blend of stunning scenery, dogged determination, and an expedition of epic proportions.
descriptionZh: 世界上最寒冷的地方也可以是最美丽的地方。观看获奖导演吉米·钦（Jimmy Chin）和自由滑雪冠军基特·德劳里埃（Kit DesLauriers）在格陵兰西部峡湾面对险峻的山脉和严寒的温度。他们必须在攀登至顶峰的过程中应对未知的变量，然后一路滑雪至山脚。这部短片融合了绝美的风景、顽强的决心，以及一场史诗般的探险。.

additionalVideos.longTitle: DJI Mavic 2 Expedition Greenland Behind the Scenes
additionalVideos.description: The short film Expedition Greenland allowed Jimmy Chin to demonstrate the endless possibilities of shooting with DJI’s Mavic 2. From beautiful aerial landscapes to adrenaline-inducing ski footage, the Mavic 2 can capture it all. Chin is able to convey the magnificence of the awe-inspiring peaks of Greenland thanks to the vivid colors and details granted by the Mavic 2.

title: DJI Mavic Air – The Last Wild Place on Earth
titleZh: 大疆 Mavic Air – 地球上最后的净土
headerTitle: DJI Mavic Air The Last Wild Place
longTitle: DJI Mavic Air The Last Wild Place on Earth
description: In 1968, The North Face founder Doug Tompkins and three friends took a legendary road trip to Patagonia, South America. Captivated by Patagonia’s natural beauty, Doug and his wife Kris moved to Chile and created Tompkins Conservation. Over the past 25 years, they have purchased and developed more than 13 million acres of protected national parks. Following Doug’s legacy, world-renowned outdoor photographer Chris Burkard ventures to Chilean Patagonia with the Mavic Air on an assignment to uncover the region’s majestic wilderness from an aerial perspective.
descriptionZh: 1968 年，The North Face 创始人道格-汤普金斯（Doug Tompkins）和三位朋友在南美巴塔哥尼亚进行了一次传奇式的公路旅行。被巴塔哥尼亚的自然美景深深吸引，道格和妻子克里斯搬到了智利，并创建了汤普金斯保护组织。在过去的 25 年里，他们购买并开发了超过 1300 万英亩的受保护国家公园。秉承道格的遗志，世界著名户外摄影师克里斯-伯卡德（Chris Burkard）驾驶 Mavic Air 前往智利巴塔哥尼亚执行任务，从空中俯瞰该地区的壮丽荒原。.

production.prod_brand: DJI

additionalVideos.description: The perfect way of capturing Hong Kong’s moveable feasts is here with the DJI Osmo Mobile. When Helene first arrived on the island, she quickly discovered a thriving yet highly competitive photography industry. In order to distinguish herself and her work to get noticed, she started to shoot from above. Watch how Helene reimagines the art of wedding photography with her own inimitable signature style.
descriptionZh: 认识一下法国航空婚礼摄影师海伦·哈瓦德（Helene Havard），她在法属波利尼西亚的塔希提岛工作。当海伦刚来到这个岛上时，她很快发现这里有一个蓬勃发展但竞争异常激烈的摄影行业。为了在众多摄影师中脱颖而出，引起人们的注意，她开始从空中拍摄。看看海伦如何用她独特的个人风格重新演绎婚礼摄影艺术。.

After relocating to Vietnam, his profession and passion came together in the form of timelapse photography. Using the Osmo and Inspire 2, adding his VFX skills, and bending the nature of time, Blackwell created award-winning videos of unimaginable scale and beauty.
descriptionZh: 当鲁弗斯·布莱克韦尔（Rufus Blackwell）回顾他在英国的视觉特效艺术家职业生涯时，他看到了等待机遇的未被充分利用的潜力。搬到越南后，他的职业和热情以延时摄影的形式结合在了一起。布莱克韦尔利用Osmo和Inspire 2，结合他的视觉特效技能，并扭曲时间，创作出了规模宏大、美轮美奂的获奖视频。.

title: DJI Profiles – Know Your Passion

description: Growing up, Ferdinand Wolf always had a passion for remote controlled vehicles. After finding success in the professional world, he decided to dedicate himself to his passion for photography and filmmaking. By combining this with his skill as an RC pilot he was able to quickly create one of Europe's top UAV film making teams. The next step in his journey led him to join DJI, making him part of creating the technology that changed his life, empowering him to change the lives of others.
descriptionZh: 费迪南德·沃尔夫（Ferdinand Wolf）从小就对遥控车辆充满热情。在事业上取得成功后，他决定投身于他对摄影和电影制作的热情。结合他作为遥控飞机飞行员的技能，他迅速组建了一支欧洲顶尖的无人机电影制作团队。他职业生涯的下一步是加入大疆，参与创造改变了他生活的技术，并使他能够改变他人的生活。.

title: DJI Phantom 4 Pro – Hawaiian Lava

description: After graduating from the New York Institute of Photography, CJ Kale moved to Hawaii to start his career as a photographer and became the first person ever to photograph lava entering the ocean from the surf, which required him risking his life to create a work of art. With the Phantom 4 Pro’s improved camera and precise controls, Kale is now able to keep breaking creative boundaries while gaining unprecedented creative control and shooting from a safe distance.
descriptionZh: 在纽约摄影学院毕业后，CJ Kale 移居夏威夷开始了他的摄影生涯，并成为第一个从浪尖拍摄熔岩入海的人，这需要他冒着生命危险去创造一件艺术品。凭借 Phantom 4 Pro 改进的相机和精确的控制，Kale 现在可以在确保安全距离拍摄的同时，不断突破创作界限，并获得前所未有的创意控制。.

description: How is the development of films related to the production of biopharmaceuticals? This is exactly the question this article from the series “The ruthless pursuit of tomorrow” will answer for you. Join Fujifilm’s biopharmaceutical CDMO production arm, FUJIFILM Diosynth Biotechnologies, on its journey toward more accessible medicine. Are you also excited to see where the planned global expansion will take us?
descriptionZh: 电影的发展与生物制药的生产有何关联？这就是“无情追求明日”系列文章将为您解答的问题。加入富士胶片的生物制药合同研发生产组织（CDMO），FUJIFILM Diosynth Biotechnologies，踏上其实现更易获得药物的旅程。您是否也对接下来的全球扩张计划感到兴奋？

additionalVideos.description: Globally, over the last twenty years, life expectancy has increased from an average of 66-years-old to 73-years-old. longTitle: DJI Stories The Lost City of Chernobyl
description: DJI was invited to visit Chernobyl with filmmaker Philip Grossman, who is making a documentary named ‘Half-Lives’. This documentary is part of a five-year personal project that Philip has been working on about the area surrounding the Chernobyl nuclear power plant, where in the early hours of 26 April 1986, one of four nuclear reactors exploded creating a 30km radius zone now known as the “The Zone”. Philip used the DJI Ronin, Phantom 3 Professional, & Inspire 1 to capture his images.
descriptionZh: 大疆创新受邀与电影制片人菲利普-格罗斯曼（Philip Grossman）一同探访切尔诺贝利。1986年4月26日凌晨，切尔诺贝利核电站四座核反应堆中的一座发生爆炸，造成方圆30公里的区域被称为 ‘核区’。菲利普使用大疆 Ronin、Phantom 3 Professional 和 Inspire 1 拍摄了照片。.

title: DJI Stories – Humpback Whales of Rarotonga
titleZh: 大疆故事 - 拉罗汤加的座头鲸
longTitle: DJI Stories Humpback Whales of Rarotonga
description: Nan Hauser, world-renowned American marine biologist based on Rarotonga and Director of the Cook Islands Whale & Wildlife Center, has spent 25 years studying whales in order to be able to better protect them. Always at the forefront of her industry, she’s now adopted the DJI Phantom 3 because of its ability to let her and her team easily and quickly survey whales without scaring them away.
descriptionZh: 南·豪瑟（Nan Hauser）是一位世界知名的美国海洋生物学家，常驻拉罗汤加岛，并且是库克群岛鲸鱼与野生动物中心的主任。她花了25年时间研究鲸鱼，以便更好地保护它们。作为行业的先驱，她现在采用了大疆“御”3无人机（DJI Phantom 3），因为它能够让她的团队轻松快速地调查鲸鱼，而不会惊吓到它们。.

title: DJI Stories – Australian Coastline Watch
titleZh: 大疆故事——澳大利亚海岸卫士
description: Shark attacks and rip currents have been an on going danger for surfers and swimmers in the beaches of Australia. Surf lifesaving and patrol teams have begun to utilize DJI’s Phantom 4 drones to more effectively perform rescues and surveillance. In this way, priorities of safety as well as maintaining harmony within the eco-system can both be addressed.

title: DJI Stories – Feeding the World
titleZh: 大疆故事——喂养世界
description: Our society and Earth itself are meeting new challenges in preserving our environment for future generations while sustaining a growing global population. The key to combining greater agricultural yields with sustainable farming practices is efficiency. Through the use of Precision Agriculture methods based on aerial systems like the DJI Matrice 100 paired with the Zenmuse XT thermal camera, crop health can easily be monitored and output increased while reducing inputs.
descriptionZh: 我们的社会和地球本身正面临着新的挑战：在养育日益增长的全球人口的同时，为子孙后代保护我们的环境。将更高的农业产量与可持续耕作方法相结合的关键在于效率。通过使用诸如大疆Matrice 100等航空系统配合Zenmuse XT热成像相机实现的精准农业方法，可以轻松监测作物健康状况，提高产量，同时减少投入。.

title: DJI Stories – Mapping the Maldives
titleZh: 大疆故事 – 马尔代夫地图绘制
description: Besieged by climate change, the beautiful coral atolls of the Maldives may soon disappear forever. Scientists predict that by 2050, most will be submerged in rising sea levels. With drones, mapping the topography of the island allows local communities and agencies like the United Nations Development Programme (UNDP), to gather evidence-based spatial data to better inform policy makers influencing climate change issues.
descriptionZh: 面对气候变化的围困，马尔代夫美丽的珊瑚环礁可能很快就会永远消失。科学家预测，到2050年，大部分岛屿将被不断上升的海平面淹没。借助无人机绘制岛屿地形图，使当地社区和联合国开发计划署（UNDP）等机构能够收集基于证据的空间数据，从而更好地为影响气候变化问题的政策制定者提供信息。.

description: When Linkin Park returned to China in the Summer of 2015 to showcase their new sound and meet a new generation of fans, we were there to capture their every step on the way through the country’s largest cities, from Shenzhen in the south, to Shanghai, Chongqing, Beijing, and Nanjing. For a unique perspective on the band, we used DJI gimbal systems including Inspire 1, Ronin, Ronin-M, and Phantom 3.
descriptionZh: 2015年夏天，林肯公园重返中国，展示他们的新声音并与新一代粉丝见面，我们捕捉了他们从南方深圳到上海、重庆、北京和南京等中国大城市的每一个足迹。为了从独特的视角展示乐队，我们使用了大疆（DJI）的稳定器系统，包括悟1（Inspire 1）、如影（Ronin）、如影（Ronin-M）和精灵3（Phantom 3）。.

See how the DJI Ronin and the Inspire 2 were put to the test in some of the harshest conditions DJI has ever shot in, to create this cinematic, moving short film.

Những đại diện của thế hệ why not đã không ngần ngại chọn đáp án cho riêng mình. Và nhiều câu chuyện rực màu khác mà Techcombank đã cùng với Thùy Tiên đi tìm và lưu lại trong thước phim này. Để lần tới, khi những người xung quanh hay chính bản thân bạn hoài nghi: Tại sao làm khác? Tại sao khám phá? Tại sao chẳng giống ai? Tại sao phiêu lưu, chọn con đường chưa biết? Bạn có thể đơn giản trả lời: WHY NOT?
descriptionZh: 生活是各种岔路口，每一次选择都将我们带向截然不同的旅程。是融入人群，还是全身心投入每一个瞬间？Why not一代的代表们毫不犹豫地选择了自己的答案。还有许多色彩斑斓的故事，是Techcombank与Thùy Tiên一起在这部电影中寻找并记录下来的。这样，下次当身边的人或你自己质疑：为什么要做得不一样？为什么要去探索？为什么要与众不同？为什么要去冒险，走一条未知的道路？你就可以简单地回答：WHY NOT？

title: Govee – Halloween 2025
titleZh: 戈维 - 2025 年万圣节
longTitle: Govee Shining with Govee The Ultimate Halloween Decorations
description: For Govee’s "Shining With Govee" Halloween 2025 campaign, we brought a full cinematic flair to the world of smart lighting. Across four themed films, our team transformed ordinary homes into eerie, movie-ready showcases—where every flicker, hue, and glow told its own spooky story. From fog-filled driveways to dancing spectral lights, the series celebrates Govee’s wide range of outdoor and indoor lighting, proving that with the right setup, you can turn your home into the ultimate haunted spectacle.
descriptionZh: 在 Govee 的 "闪耀 Govee "万圣节 2025 宣传活动中，我们为智能照明世界带来了十足的电影风格。在四部主题影片中，我们的团队将普通家庭变成了阴森恐怖的电影展示厅，每一个闪烁、色调和光芒都在诉说着自己的诡异故事。从雾气弥漫的车道到舞动的幽灵灯，该系列展示了 Govee 广泛的室外和室内照明产品，证明只要设置得当，就能将您的家变成终极闹鬼奇观。.

title: Govee – Permanent Outdoor Lights
titleZh: Govee – 永恒户外灯
description: We partnered with Govee to launch Permanent Outdoor Lights Prism, a new benchmark in smart outdoor illumination. Through two cinematic films—a sleek product reveal and a lifestyle commercial—we showcased the Prism’s triple-color Luminblend performance, seamless roofline design, and all-weather durability. Each scene was crafted to highlight how Govee’s most advanced lighting system yet transforms ordinary architecture into dynamic, customizable art—bringing year-round brilliance to the modern smart home.
descriptionZh: 我们与 Govee 合作推出了 Permanent Outdoor Lights Prism，这是智能户外照明的新标杆。通过两部电影——一场时尚的产品发布片和一支生活方式商业片——我们展示了 Prism 的三色 Luminblend 性能、无缝的屋顶线条设计以及全天候的耐用性。每个场景都旨在突出 Govee 目前最先进的照明系统如何将普通建筑转化为动态、可定制的艺术品——为现代智能家居带来全年璀璨光彩。.

description: Shot at Nu Boyana Film Studios in Bulgaria, our launch film for the realme 15 Series 5G brings cinematic energy to everyday life — from workday hustle to nights out with friends. title: realme C85 – Your Ultimate Outdoor Sidekick
titleZh: 真我 C85 – 您的终极户外玩伴
longTitle: realme C85 Your Ultimate Outdoor Sidekick
description: We partnered with realme to create the global launch film for its new realme C85 5G smartphone. Shot entirely in Ho Chi Minh City, the campaign turns everyday street life into a fast-paced playground of waterproof chaos—pushing the phone’s durability to its limits through a series of high-energy, disaster-filled moments. Featuring a fun, tongue-in-cheek voiceover and practical liquid effects captured on Phantom high-speed cameras, the film celebrates Southeast Asia’s working-class grit with cinematic flair, transforming the C85 into a bold, street-smart hero built for real-world endurance.
descriptionZh: 我们与realme合作，为其新款realme C85 5G智能手机打造了全球发布影片。该影片全部在胡志明市拍摄，将日常的街头生活变成了快节奏的防水混乱游乐场——通过一系列充满活力的灾难性时刻，将手机的耐用性推向极限。影片采用轻松幽默的画外音和在Phantom高速摄影机上捕捉到的实用液体特效，以电影般的风格庆祝东南亚劳动人民的坚韧不拔，将C85塑造成一款为现实世界耐用性而打造的、大胆、街头智慧的英雄。.

title: Mammotion – LUBA 3 AWD
titleZh: Mammotion - LUBA 3 AWD
description:
Shot on location in Cape Town, this project for Mammotion explores a more cinematic approach to product storytelling—grounding advanced robotics in real-world environments that feel expansive, natural, and lived-in. Directed by Alexis Odiowei, the film leans into contrast: precision technology operating seamlessly within rugged terrain, shifting light conditions, and organic landscapes.

Our focus was on balancing clean, product-driven visuals with a sense of atmosphere and scale. Rather than over-explaining functionality, we let movement, composition, and environment do the heavy lifting—building a visual language that feels intuitive and confident. The result is a piece that positions the product through tone and context, not just features, while maintaining a strong, premium aesthetic throughout.
descriptionZh:
Mammotion 的这一项目在开普敦取景拍摄，探索了一种更加电影化的产品叙事方法--将先进的机器人技术融入到真实世界的环境中，让人感受到广阔、自然和生活气息。本片由 Alexis Odiowei 执导，影片采用对比手法：精密技术在崎岖的地形、多变的光线条件和有机景观中无缝运行。

我们的重点是在简洁、产品驱动的视觉效果与氛围和规模感之间取得平衡。我们没有过多地解释功能，而是让运动、构图和环境来完成这些繁重的工作，从而建立起一种让人感觉直观而自信的视觉语言。最终，作品通过基调和背景，而不仅仅是功能，对产品进行了定位，同时始终保持了强烈、优质的美感。.

title: BRINC Guardian – Next Generation of Response
titleZh: BRINC 守护者 - 下一代响应系统
longTitle: BRINC Guardian Next Generation of Response
description:
BRINC Guardian is a next-generation Drone as First Responder (DFR) platform designed for modern public safety operations. Produced by Vantage Pictures, this launch film uses a grounded, real-time narrative to showcase how autonomous drones integrate with law enforcement workflows—from dispatch and pursuit to containment and rescue.

Filmed across California and Vietnam, the production combines real police collaboration, a custom-built Real-Time Crime Center (RTCC), and advanced drone technology to highlight key capabilities including thermal imaging, autonomous deployment, and Starlink connectivity. The result is an authentic, scenario-driven portrayal of how drone systems are transforming emergency response.
descriptionZh:
BRINC Guardian 是专为现代公共安全行动设计的下一代 "无人机第一响应者"（DFR）平台。这部发布影片由 Vantage Pictures 制作，采用接地气的实时叙事方式，展示了自主无人机如何与执法工作流程相结合--从调度和追捕到围堵和救援。

影片在加利福尼亚州和越南拍摄，结合了真实的警务合作、定制的实时犯罪中心（RTCC）和先进的无人机技术，突出了热成像、自主部署和星链连接等关键功能。该片以真实的场景为导向，描述了无人机系统如何改变应急响应。.
